View this page

Export¶

Export schemas to JSON Schema format.

JSON Schema Export¶

from griot_core.export import export_to_jsonschema

json_schema = export_to_jsonschema(
    schema,
    draft_version="2020-12",
    include_extensions=True,
)

Supported Drafts¶

  • 2020-12 (default)

  • draft-07

  • draft-04

Extensions¶

With include_extensions=True, the output includes:

  • x-griot-schema-id

  • x-griot-pii-type

  • x-griot-physical-type

API Reference¶

Griot Core Export Module.

This module provides export functionality for schemas and contracts to various formats including JSON Schema.

griot_core.export.export_to_jsonschema(schema, draft='2020-12', include_extensions=True, include_descriptions=True)[source]¶

Export a Schema to JSON Schema format.

Generates a JSON Schema that can be used for: - API request/response validation - Form generation (react-jsonschema-form, etc.) - IDE autocompletion and validation - OpenAPI integration

Parameters:

  • schema (Schema) – The Griot Schema to export

  • draft (str) – JSON Schema draft version (“2020-12”, “draft-07”, etc.)

  • include_extensions (bool) – Include x-* extensions for Griot metadata

  • include_descriptions (bool) – Include description fields

Returns:

JSON Schema as dictionary

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

Example

>>> from griot_core.models import Schema
>>> from griot_core.export import export_to_jsonschema
>>>
>>> schema = Schema(
...     id="sch-001",
...     name="employees",
...     version="1.0.0",
...     status=SchemaStatus.ACTIVE,
...     physical_name="hr.employees",
...     description="Employee records",
...     owner_team="data-team",
...     properties=[...]
... )
>>> json_schema = export_to_jsonschema(schema)
class griot_core.export.JSONSchemaExporter(draft='2020-12', include_extensions=True, include_descriptions=True)[source]¶

Exporter for converting Griot Schemas to JSON Schema format.

Supports multiple JSON Schema draft versions and optional Griot-specific extensions.

Parameters:

  • draft (str)

  • include_extensions (bool)

  • include_descriptions (bool)

DRAFT_SCHEMAS = {'2019-09': 'https://json-schema.org/draft/2019-09/schema', '2020-12': 'https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema', 'draft-06': 'http://json-schema.org/draft-06/schema#', 'draft-07': 'http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#'}¶
__init__(draft='2020-12', include_extensions=True, include_descriptions=True)[source]¶

Initialize the exporter.

Parameters:

  • draft (str) – JSON Schema draft version

  • include_extensions (bool) – Include x-* extensions

  • include_descriptions (bool) – Include descriptions

export(schema)[source]¶

Export a Schema to JSON Schema format.

Parameters:

schema (Schema) – The Schema to export

Returns:

JSON Schema dictionary

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]
